notes: Refers to a single act of breathing. Common in the phrase 'in einem Atemzug' meaning 'in the same breath' or 'in one go'.

sentences.german: Er nahm einen tiefen Atemzug, bevor er zu sprechen begann.
sentences.english: He took a deep breath before he began to speak.

sentences.german: Sie nannte seine beiden Fehler in einem Atemzug.
sentences.english: She mentioned his two mistakes in the same breath.
